title: Historia de una mala mujer
writer: Ariel Cortazzo, Pedro Miguel Obligado, Luis Saslavsky
actors: Dolores del Rio, María Duval, Alberto Closas
plot: Lord Windermere appears to all - including to his young wife Margaret - as the perfect husband. But their happy marriage is placed at risk when Lord Windermere starts spending his afternoons with an adventuress who is working her ...
